label: Risk KPIs
description: Nine risk metrics with sparklines: P&L, exposure, margin%, VaR95, ES95, alert count, VaR99, ES99, and kill switch count.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks import in widget file.

0.6.note: KPI values computed from numeric context fields; renders immediately.

0.7.note: Empty defiRiskProfiles hides DeFi sections; base metrics always render.

0.9.note: Hardcoded stub values replaced with '—' for unmapped KPIs.

1.7.note: FINDING logged: defiRiskProfiles sourced from STRATEGY_RISK_PROFILES (lib/mocks) via context; should be API-sourced.

l1.notes: Mock source for defiRiskProfiles flows through context from use-risk-page-data.ts. Widget itself is clean.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ (real-time VaR/ES/alerts), paper ✓ (same metrics, paper P&L), batch ✓ (as-of values). No mode-specific exclusions.

3.2.note: use-risk-page-data.ts reads scope.mode; isBatchMode=scope.mode==='batch'. Passed to context.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget should display same KPIs sourced from paper account data. No interactive submission; safe to show in paper mode.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget. Data driven by SWR hooks in use-risk-page-data.ts; batch mode uses same hook with historical data.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human must verify 3.3 (no order entry — N/A for KPI widget) and 3.4 (batch indicator visible) in browser.

4.1.note: No empty onClick handlers. Toggle buttons (Table/Chart) have real state setters.

4.6.note: Entitlement checks not in widget render path; handled by widget-wrapper at registration level.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human must verify 4.3 (no form fields — N/A), 4.4 (toggle updates view), 4.7 (CollapsibleSection toggles), 4.8 (WidgetScroll contains content).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all risk-bearing strategies (defi-basis-trade, defi-recursive-staked-basis, defi-amm-lp, defi-lending-borrowing, cefi-spot-arbitrage, cefi-stat-arb). Widget aggregates risk across all active strategies.

l5.notes: Strategy list documented. Human walkthrough required for 5.2-5.6.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 15 tests covering base KPI labels (6), KPI values (3), DeFi section (5), error state (1). See tests/widgets/risk/risk-kpi-strip.test.tsx

7.1.note: Hardcoded hex colors in RISK_CHART_COLORS replaced with var(--chart-2/3/5); #ef4444 replaced with var(--destructive).

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file. Mock source (STRATEGY_RISK_PROFILES) flows via context; context-level issue logged in knownIssues.

7.3.note: 365 lines — within 500 limit. DeFiRiskTimeSeriesChart sub-component extracted; largest function ~80 lines.

7.4.note: RiskKpiStripWidget PascalCase, DeFiRiskTimeSeriesChart PascalCase, RiskLevelBadge PascalCase. File kebab-case.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No inline object/array literals in useEffect/useMemo deps. State setter via useState is stable.

l7.notes: 7.1 fixed in this session. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: text-[9px]/text-[10px]/text-[11px] replaced with text-nano/text-micro/text-caption tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.2.note: No bracket spacing violations (p-[Npx], m-[Npx]). All spacing uses Tailwind scale.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, Button, Table from components/ui/*. Card wrapper via KpiSummaryWidget shared component.

8.4.note:
Agent: no without alt, no bare
. Range inputs have visible labels. Human: keyboard walk + screen-reader pass required.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=1 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2/8.3 pass. 8.4/8.5 need human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Aggregates across all risk dimensions; would be too dense if merged with any single-metric widget.

relationships.notes: Summary KPI strip for the risk tab. No cross-widget selection coupling.

dataContract.notes: VaR/ES via useVaR() SWR hook. Greeks via usePortfolioGreeks(). Limits via useRiskLimits(). DeFi risk profiles currently mocked.

gaps: Firm P&L, Net Exposure, Margin Used KPIs have no context source — rendered as '—'
DeFi risk profiles mocked, not API-sourced
coverage.notes: Widget aggregates all asset classes. Per-class verification pending.

knownIssues: 1.7: defiRiskProfiles (STRATEGY_RISK_PROFILES) and defiDeltaComposite base (MOCK_PORTFOLIO_DELTA) flow from lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-risk through use-risk-page-data.ts into context. Should be API-sourced or moved to lib/constants/defi.
Firm P&L, Net Exposure, Margin Used KPIs have no context source — rendered as '—' pending context wiring.

findings.fix: Added hasError early-return rendering 'Failed to load risk KPIs' message

findings.description: risk-kpi-strip-widget.tsx — hardcoded stub values '+$1.04M', '$5.2M', '47%' for Firm P&L / Net Exposure / Margin Used
findings.fix: Replaced with '—' (context does not yet expose these fields)

findings.description: risk-kpi-strip-widget.tsx:33-35 — RISK_CHART_COLORS used hardcoded hex: #10b981, #3b82f6, #f59e0b; line:68 — #ef4444 for liquidation threshold
findings.fix: Replaced with var(--chart-2), var(--chart-3), var(--chart-5), var(--destructive) respectively

findings.description: risk-kpi-strip-widget.tsx — ~35 user-visible strings (KPI labels, DeFi section headings, table headers)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-kpi-strip-widget.tsx — text-[9px], text-[10px], text-[11px] used for dense widget label sizing
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed

findings.description: risk-kpi-strip DeFi sub-section visibility (hasDefiStrategies) is driven by STRATEGY_RISK_PROFILES.length > 0 (always truthy in mock) or getFilledDefiOrders().length > 0. Does NOT respect global scope — DeFi panel shows even when user filters to a non-DeFi strategy. Should cross-reference scopeStrategyIds and the selected strategies' asset class.
findings.deferReason: Scope-aware gating requires wiring strategy → asset-class map into use-risk-page-data. Logged for BP-5.

findings.description: risk-kpi-strip-widget.tsx:192-194 — three base KPI metrics (Firm P&L, Net Exposure, Margin Used) render fixed em-dash '—' as placeholder. No data source wired. User sees 3 of 9 tiles as dashes regardless of state.
findings.deferReason: Missing data — pnl summary + positions summary are available via hooks/api but not yet wired into risk-data-context. Logged for BP-5.
